document.title: TkVillage app.py Data Dictionary
document.format_note: Concise JSON document using named sections and plain strings. Field names mirror tkvillage.app where useful.
document.scope: Runtime data owned by tkvillage.app after the removal of the TkVillage config subsystem.

summary.principle: Scalar-ish runtime values live in g. Mutable registries and logs live as explicit module-level dictionaries and lists. Reset preserves container identities with clear()/update().
summary.configuration_boundary: TkVillage does not own app configuration. In the common lionscliapp case, use lionscliapp for application configuration. TkVillage may keep runtime-specific files under <lionscliapp-project>/tkvillage.

g.json_clean: No. g may contain Tk objects, pathlib.Path objects, and callables.

host_project_dir.hook: The host project directory. In lionscliapp mode this is lionscliapp's project root; in standalone mode it equals project_dir.

project_dir.hook: TkVillage-owned runtime directory. In lionscliapp mode this becomes host_project_dir / 'tkvillage' after ensure_ready().

project_dir_name.hook: Standalone project directory name or the TkVillage subdirectory name in lionscliapp mode.

project_root.hook: Parent directory used to resolve standalone project-dir-name.

lionscliapp.hook: True when TkVillage is hosted by lionscliapp and defers path readiness until command/runtime entry.

is_ready.hook: True after ensure_ready() has resolved and created the TkVillage runtime directory.

test_mode.hook: When true, tick exceptions are re-raised after logging.

strict_effects.hook: Reserved strictness flag for effect handling.

tick_interval_ms.hook: Tk after() interval for the periodic tick loop.

tick_after_id.hook: Tk after() callback id for the scheduled tick.

max_log_entries.hook: Maximum entries kept in bounded runtime logs.

shutdown_policy.hook: Policy checked at the end of each tick.

shutdown_window_kind.hook: Window kind watched by on-window-close shutdown policy.

is_shutting_down.hook: True while graceful or hard shutdown is underway.

shutdown_handler.hook: Optional one function called once when shutdown starts.

has_had_window.hook: True once any window has existed; prevents immediate last-window shutdown before first window.

shutdown_window_kind_seen.hook: True once the watched shutdown window kind has existed.

window_kinds.json_clean: Mostly; callables are present in records.

windows_by_instance_key.hook: Maps multiplicity instance keys to live window ids.

targets.json_clean: Partly; service target records include handler callables.
targets.hook: Message/event routing targets for windows and services.

debug.hook: Debug mode and last JSON-friendly snapshot.

ready_contract.declare_app: Records mode and path intent. Standalone requires project-dir or project-dir-name. lionscliapp mode does not require project-dir-name and does not create folders during declaration.
ready_contract.ensure_ready: Creates and records the actual TkVillage directory. In lionscliapp mode, call after lionscliapp has entered command/runtime execution.
ready_contract.run: Calls ensure_ready() before ensuring the Tk root and starting the mainloop.
